_meta.name: intra_tier | gpu_class
_meta.rationale: Hidden variable catching 'intra-class premium-ness'. Within a gpu_class, users vary in how premium their OTHER components are (RAM, SSD, cores). A mid_range GPU paired with 32 cores + 2TB SSD is a 'premium' mid_range user. Without this var, hwc/screen/storage would be statistically independent given gpu_class — unrealistic (real users pick coherent bundles). Tier distribution biased: integrated_old mostly budget/standard, workstation mostly premium.
